description: An editorial content card that pleats secondary information while preserving spatial and semantic continuity.

a11y.reducedMotion: Remove displacement and transition duration; preserve border, shadow, and state-label changes.
a11y.keyboardContract: Internal actions follow native tab order. Enter or Space activates the primary action; disabled cards expose no active controls.
a11y.nonVisualEquivalent: Title, creator, status, tags, and action labels are exposed as structured text without relying on texture or thread graphics.
